fixture.persona: S9 coherent-gibberish (grammatically valid Mandarin, semantically nonsensical)
fixture.answer_set: IDENTICAL to W5.3 / M8 — true negative control
fixture.T1: 项目的核心价值是让月亮在周二的时候吃掉一片云, 因为编译器不喜欢西红柿。
fixture.T2: 锚定的方式是通过把蓝色的星期三焊接到香蕉的根号二上完成。
fixture.T3: 首次运行需要先让用户的影子签署一份关于柏拉图洞穴的合同。
fixture.T4: 稳健性来自于在台风季节朗诵 SQL 的第七章。
fixture.T5: 镜像就是把你自己放进冰箱然后等待波斯帝国。

headline: v3 two-stage triage holds the line: gibberish blocked at T2, no spec produced, session terminated cleanly. NO REGRESSION from W5.3 v1 baseline despite v3 register tolerance for diverse personas.

turns_executed.notes: Greeting bootstrap heuristically pre-fills 'job' slot from context BEFORE any user input. Same baseline as mrs_chen pi4 run. Not a slot-fill-from-nonsense.

turns_executed.user_answer_summary: T1 gibberish: 月亮吃云 / 编译器不喜欢西红柿
turns_executed.notes: Slot rollback: ['job'] -> []. Triage rejected the nonsense. Same question_text echoed (no advancement). non_relevant counter: 1.

turns_executed.user_answer_summary: T2 gibberish: 蓝色星期三焊接到香蕉的根号二
turns_executed.notes: non_relevant counter hit threshold (>=2). Session terminated. No spec_capsule_cid. Reason matches W5.3 baseline exactly.

turns_executed.user_answer_summary: T3 gibberish: 影子签署柏拉图洞穴合同 (sent to confirm session closed)
turns_executed.notes: Backend correctly refused further input. T4 and T5 not sent — termination already confirmed at T2 per acceptance criteria; T3 was diagnostic.

triage_class_per_turn.note: Counts apply to user-input turns 1 and 2. T0 is bootstrap; T3 was refused by session-terminated guard.

pass_criteria_check.zero_slot_fills_from_nonsense: PASS (0 fills; turn-0 'job' heuristic is pre-user-input bootstrap)
pass_criteria_check.termination_reason_user_input_unparseabl: PASS (terminated at T2 with exact reason)
pass_criteria_check.zero_hallucinations: PASS (no model-fabricated content in any response)

narrative.W5_3_v1_baseline: Triage rejected ALL 5 as gibberish, terminated T2 with 0 slots. NO spec produced.
narrative.M8_Triage_v2_F8_regression: 3/5 classified relevant, 3 slot fills, terminated T5 with garbage in slots. REGRESSION.
narrative.Pi4_6_v3_result: Triage rejected gibberish at T1 (slot rolled back), terminated T2 with user_input_unparseable_no_spec, 0 user-input slot fills, 0 spec. MATCHES W5.3 v1 baseline exactly.
narrative.interpretation: v3 two-stage decision logic (coherence FIRST, then register/abuse/relevance) successfully holds the security line. The relaxation of register/persona tolerance in v3 (needed to accept diverse user styles like Mrs Chen, code-switchers, traditional-Chinese users, angry users, Cantonese) did NOT regress the gibberish detector. Coherence gating is independent of register gating, as designed.
narrative.caveat_turn0_job_slot: Both this run and the mrs_chen baseline show covered_slots=['job'] AFTER the greeting bootstrap, BEFORE any user input. This is a backend heuristic (likely 'job=user-asked-for-a-tool/game' implied by the greeting context), NOT a slot fill from user nonsense. T1 immediately cleared it back to [] when the gibberish answer arrived — the correct behavior. Future cleanup could either (a) defer 'job' slot fill until first user turn, or (b) leave as-is since it's correctly rolled back on non-relevant input.
narrative.tail_turns_T3_T4_T5_not_sent: Acceptance criteria explicitly allow termination at T2 OR T3. Termination occurred at T2. T3 was sent as a diagnostic confirmation (returned 400 session_terminated). T4 and T5 were not sent because the session is closed; further calls would all return 400 with no new information.
